entries.name: C++ Programming Specialization
entries.description: Structured C++ track covering fundamentals through object-oriented design—aligned with intro programming courses.

entries.name: AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials
entries.description: Foundational cloud concepts and AWS services—useful for engineers building scalable systems.

entries.name: Google IT Automation with Python
entries.description: Python scripting and automation skills that complement C++ programming foundations.

entries.name: Python for Everybody Specialization
entries.description: Beginner-friendly Python sequence for students preparing for data-oriented or scripting-heavy courses.

entries.name: Google Data Analytics Certificate
entries.description: Spreadsheets, SQL, and visualization—helpful prep for probability and statistics coursework.

entries.name: Intro to Programming Bootcamp (12 weeks)
entries.description: Live cohort with mentor support, portfolio projects, and career coaching for CMPSC-style intro sequences.
